sum: In addition to the Solaufein NPC mod for recruiting the famous drow in Ust Natha, here's the continuation of the romance available for completion, with many ideas compiled in this completed mod, includi...
no: This mod adds a bit of extra flirting content to Weimer's excellent Solaufein Romance Mod. (BGII, ToB, BGT, BGII:EE, EET)

co.n: The RPG Solaufein Flirt Pack for BG2 (Rated NC17)
co.tp2n: The RPG Solaufein Flirt Pack for BG2 (Rated NC17)
